titleStmt.title: SII 39.118: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 118. (A.R. No. 118 of 1916.) ETTIYĀTTALI, ARANTANGI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. AGASTYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH AND WEST WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE.

summary.p: This inscription records that a certain Poṉṉambalanāda-Toṇḍaimāṉār restored the taṉikkāṇiyātchi right of the village of Thaḷināṭṭumaṅgalamkāraiyūr near Iṭṭiyūrtaḷi to Teṉṉavadaraiyar the temple accountant. The land had been wrongly given to another person.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
maṉmata varuṣam Āṉi mātam 10 § śrīmat poṉṉampala
nātat toṇṭaimāṉār ṉa teṉṉavataraiyar
kku varakkāṭṭiṉa kāriyam Iṭṭiyūr taḷikoyil kaṇakku U
ṉṉiṭa kāṇiyāṭci Eṉkiṟa viparam Aṟiyātapaṭiyāle pū
pālarāyaṉ makaṉukku kuṭuttom Uṉakku pūṟuvam Iṭ
ṭiyūr taḷināṭṭu maṅkalam karaiyūr Uṉṉiṭa taṉikkā
ṇiyāṭci Eṅkira viparam keṭṭom Ākaiyāle nām
Avaṉukku kuṭutta kāṇiyāṭciyum Ōlaiyum koṇṭu A
vaṉukku paramillai pūṟuvam pole Iṭṭiyūr taḷināṭṭu ma
ṅkalam karaiyūr Uṉṉiṭataṉik kāṇiyāṭciyākave
paṟṟi cantirātittavar cella Aṉupavittuk koḷḷavum
Digital edition of SII 39.118 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
